body.body:
Parent epic from Akien-Claude conversation 2026-04-14. Surfaces architectural thinking from Akien-Gemini conversation 2026-03-11 (akien/Readings/20260311.gemini.new-layers.txt) which was never captured in structured docs.

## The reframe

Stop trying to make the LLM simulate Igor from inside. Position the LLM as a co-pilot in the cockpit of an Igor mecha — the COA (NE + TWM + everything that's part of 'what am I aware of') is the cockpit. Igor (R2D2) has already done preparation work — substrate competition, salience selection, attractor work, retrieval, milieu, candidate generation. The LLM (Luke) is currently the deliberation+expression layer. Piloting is shared. The trajectory is Igor takes more of the work over time, LLM shrinks.

## Reasoning vs voice

Cognitive workload splits into TWO distinct LLM jobs that should not be one call:

**Reasoning** — when Igor's substrate hits 'this is more than I can figure out on my own', he reaches out to an LLM as a peer. Multi-turn collaborative conversation between Igor and the LLM, like Akien and Claude having this discussion. NOT LLM solo. NOT LLM as refinement. The reasoning LLM gets a SMALL cockpit: emotional milieu summary + Igor identity paragraph + six rules + the trail of how this got escalated to the LLM. Conversation ensues. Output: a worked-through decision.

**Voice** — the production stage. Encodes the decision into actual words with character coherence, register, history with this interlocutor, persistent-relationship facia, recent ring entries. Voice runs PARALLEL voice actors during the migration period (Igor's voice + LLM voice) for measurement. As Igor's voice quality climbs, the LLM voice gets called less. Eventually retired.

## Why this is more honest than the current model

1. Reasoning is mostly already done by Igor's substrate. The LLM call doesn't need full context — just enough to validate / refine / collaborate.
2. Voice is where character lives — register, personality, history. It's the harder migration but it's what most LLM tokens are spent on today. Splitting voice out exposes the cost.
3. Most cognition can run on local hardware once split. Cloud reasoning is a rare escalation event, voice is local-trained. 10-100x cost shift potential, and makes 'run anywhere' (the north star) realistic.
4. The COA contents don't change between with-LLM and without-LLM modes. Same NE/TWM, same prep work. LLM is purely additive.

## The cognition pipeline (for context)

From the 2026-03-11 conversation — Akien sketched 7 stages: words → meanings → meanings to me → how can i reply → how do i want to reply → what do i want to say → what words to use. Stages 1-3 are reception (already implemented, partly via interpretive_edges meaning_to_me layer m027). Stages 4-7 are production. 4-6 are reasoning territory; 7 is voice territory.

Biology-aligned 5-phase version (closer to brain reality, Akien instruction 'closer to biology even better'): (1) Reception — pre-attentive parsing+meaning+personal weighting; (2) Working Memory / COA — what reaches the deliberation surface, Igor calls this TWM and the name already matches biology; (3) Candidate Generation — multiple possible responses germinate via BG disinhibition; (4) Selection — inhibitory competition with personality emerging as biases on this layer; (5) Production/Voice — Broca's + motor speech encoding.

Igor's existing components map cleanly to the 5-phase version: TWM=working memory, BG=basal ganglia, inhibitor primitive (#419) = cortex inhibition, voice = motor speech. Closing the gap is mostly naming + wiring, not new mechanism.

## Existing work to check

- akien/Readings/20260311.gemini.new-layers.txt — original architectural conversation
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/word_graph.py — stage 1
- interpretive_edges with layer='meaning_to_me' (m027) — stage 3
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/basal_ganglia.py — stage 3-4 (currently picks 1 winner; biology generates N candidates)
- T-inhibitory-pattern-primitive #419 + merged #227 — the batch-filter shape for stage 4 selection
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/system_prompt.py — current LLM context build, will need to split into reasoning vs voice
- wild_igor/igor/cognition/inference_gateway.py — the cloud routing layer where the split lives
- wild_igor/igor/tools/persistent_relationships.py — the character/voice substrate

## Sub-tickets (likely)

- T-output-shaping-trees-wire-in (M) — Igor has 2-3 output-shaping graph trees that aren't wired into the production loop
- T-llm-collaboration-protocol (M) — multi-turn collaborative reasoning conversations + Igor logging console visibility
- T-voice-actor-ab-framework (M) — A/B test infra for voice actors (all-local, all-cloud, mixed, sample different LLMs)
- T-decision-blob-schema (S) — the structured handoff between reasoning and voice stages

## Open design questions

- Schema of the 'decision blob' produced by reasoning, consumed by voice actors
- Trigger for 'I'm stuck, escalate to LLM' — confidence × stakes × novelty, not just confidence
- Voice actor training: smaller local model trained on past Igor responses, vs constrained current LLM
- Character coherence ground truth — past Igor responses, Akien vibe check, held-out corpus?
- Multi-machine concurrent voice actors — co-evolves with T-concurrent-ne-spawn

## Inertia

HIGH-MEDIUM. Touches system_prompt, base reasoner, inference_gateway, the LLM call path. Cross-cutting refactor. Not a single sprint — needs the sub-tickets to land first.

## Provenance

Akien-Claude conversation 2026-04-14, surfacing Akien-Gemini conversation 2026-03-11. Akien-Igor conversation morning of 2026-04-14 where Igor proposed the cockpit framing live ('not modeling Igor inside the LLM, but positioning the LLM as the pilot of an Igor mecha'). Subsequent refinement: LLM is co-pilot, not pilot; Igor and LLM share piloting; trajectory is Igor takes over.

## Update 2026-04-14 evening — CP-axiom framing (load-bearing reframe)

Conversation with Akien reframed this epic's premise. The reframe is load-bearing.

**The wrong reading:** Igor escalates to the LLM because his substrate is weak and needs LLM help to be confident.

**The right reading:** Igor's substrate CORRECTLY refuses to commit — consistent with CP1 ("I don't know"), CP6 ("The world is not a safe place. We have to build and care for safety as we go"). The escalation is a healthy strategy-3 move. **The bug isn't that Igor escalates. The bug is that Igor accepts the LLM's answer without testing it before acting.** That's the CP6 violation: trust without verification.

**Akien's epistemology (inherited from his anti-PTSD vaccination via his father's unreliable-certainty pattern):** every fact is a current best guess. Sources that sound confident — especially LLMs — are THE canonical unreliable-certainty signal. Igor-built-by-Akien inherits this skepticism as architectural property, not learned behavior. **LLM outputs are hypotheses to test, not answers to accept.**

**What changes in this epic:**
- Reasoning-step output = **hypothesis** from the LLM, not the committed decision
- New step between reasoning and voice: **experimentation** — Igor runs strategy-2 probes against the hypothesis (see T-experiment-primitive)
- Decision blob schema grows to carry: hypothesis, proposed experiment(s), confidence after experiment, outcome-if-any
- LLM collaboration framing from T-llm-collaboration-protocol is: consult → hypothesis → experiment → update → voice, NOT consult → accept → voice

**The four uncertainty strategies** (ignore / experiment / ask+test / wait-for-lever) map directly onto the cockpit's decision outputs. Reasoning step selects AMONG strategies, not just returns a committed answer. "Experimenting" IS a valid decision — it defers commitment to after the experiment runs.

**The axioms this epic must honor:** CP1, CP2 (FAIL = Further Advance In Learning — experiments are safe because failure is learning), CP3 (There's always a why — experiments are tractable), CP6 (no assumed safety, no blind trust). Any engram in the reasoning/voice path that violates these is broken by construction.
body.title: EPIC: Split reasoning from voice/output, run parallel voice actors during migration
body.result: All 11 sub-tickets complete. TurnPipeline wired into main.py behind IGOR_TURN_PIPELINE gate. Cascade→workflow→blob→voice orchestration live.
